Flowstate

Design System

Exportable UI specimens — artifacts, cards, connectors, and tokens.

Core colors

Left swatch is light theme, right is dark. Source: lib/design/tokens.ts

canvas-bg

#FAFAF8

canvas-card

#FFFFFF

canvas-border

#E6E4DF

canvas-ink

#2C2A26

#8A867E

canvas-accent

#6B4EFF

#F3F2EF

canvas-connector

#B8B5AE

Typography

text-canvas-micro — The quick brown fox

10px

text-canvas-caption — The quick brown fox

11px

text-canvas-compact — The quick brown fox

12px

text-canvas-body-sm — The quick brown fox

13px

text-canvas-body — The quick brown fox

14px

text-canvas-body-lg — The quick brown fox

15px

text-canvas-heading — The quick brown fox

18px

text-canvas-brand — The quick brown fox

22.5px

text-canvas-display — The quick brown fox

52px

Radii & spacing

Corner radii

  • rounded-canvas — 12px
  • rounded-canvas-sm — 8px
  • rounded-canvas-xs — 2px

Spacing scale

  • compact — 12px
  • section — 16px
